generatedAnalysisDescription:
--- --- ---
Script RANDOM SEARCH (Ra) 
--- --- ---
This script computes kmeans-based reclassification scores with less landmarks (LM)

Input file name: Female_67 min 22 har.txt

Input file dimensions: 89,32
(The 89 rows are subdivided into 67,22 )

Maximum number of configurations by subset: 360

For each subset, the number of PCs (of shape) used for reclassification will be equal to the number of LM minus 4
*** Ideally, the perfect reclassification should give ==> 67,22
*** A reclassification >= the one obtained with the full set of landmarks = "positive" reclassification
*** "Allometry" is computed as the linear determination coefficient of the first PC of shape variable regressed on size
*** "Adjusted" accuracy takes into account a correct classification obtained by chance only
*** The Procrustes distance used on the subsets of landmarks is an estimate based on the PCs of shape (rather than the rotated configurations)
Procrustes distance between groups (67,22): 0.016674693675140097 (from rotated data)
